title: Lampranthus laetus
taxonomy: Lampranthus laetus is a member of the family Aizoaceae. This classification places it within the order Caryophyllales. The family Aizoaceae, also known as the stone plants, is a group of succulent plants native to southern Africa. Lampranthus laetus is further classified under the genus Lampranthus, which is a group of flowering plants.
